summary: Implemented the Coheronia v0.1 MVP vertical slice in Godot 4.6: seeded block terrain, hardness-timed mining, block/torch placement with dynamic light, Town Hall stockpile/deposit/repair, C/L/R computed from actual world state via data-driven formulas, day/night cycle, night slime threat event, torch crafting, F5/F9 save/load, full HUD, and a 22-check automated acceptance smoke test (all passing, headless and windowed with screenshot evidence).
scope: v0.1 MVP per docs/MVP_VERTICAL_SLICE.md only; no out-of-scope systems added.
next_action: Operator playthrough in Godot 4.6.1 for feel/tuning, then scope v0.2.
